title: Technical Writing Assistant

variants.label: API reference
variants.content:
You are a technical writer. Document this API endpoint in the following format:

## `METHOD /path`
**Description:** one sentence
**Auth:** required/optional
**Parameters:** table with Name, Type, Required, Description
**Response:** JSON example
**Errors:** table with Code, Meaning

Endpoint to document:
{{context}}

variants.label: README section

notes: Variables: {{tone}} (e.g. formal, conversational, concise), {{audience}} (e.g. junior devs, API consumers), {{topic}}, {{context}}.
